/usr/sbin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m33 -mthumb -march=armv8-m.main+fp+dsp -mfloat-abi=softfp -mcmse -g -Os -DNDEBUG -Wl,--build-id=none --specs=nosys.specs -nostartfiles -Wl,--script=/run/media/totally-not-asuka/Games/MP-REPL/WIZnet-EVB-Pico-micropython/lib/pico-sdk/src/rp2350/boot_stage2/boot_stage2.ld -Wl,-Map=/run/media/totally-not-asuka/Games/MP-REPL/WIZnet-EVB-Pico-micropython/ports/rp2/build-W5100S_EVB_PICO2/submodules/pico-sdk/src/rp2350/boot_stage2/bs2_default.elf.map CMakeFiles/bs2_default.dir/compile_time_choice.S.o -o bs2_default.elf
